changes.description: Added AmityVideoSDK, AmityUIKit, AmityUIKit4, AmityLiveVideoBroadcastKit to KNOWN_VALID_IMPORTS; fixed lookup_member to descend into nested_types (resolves AmityCommunityMembership.QueryFilter/SearchFilter); added KNOWN_VALID_REFS allowlist for AmityMentionMapper.metadata (class func captured as nested_type{name:'func'} by extractor).

Added EXCLUDED_PATH_PREFIXES with 'uikit/' and 'social-plus-sdk/video-new/' (mirrors Flutter validator from 0034); added ANDROID_PLATFORM_TYPES allowlist (Environment, Context, Activity, etc.); added KNOWN_VALID_REFS for AmityRoom.ParticipantType.CoHost (real PascalCase enum, extractor blind spot) and AmityPinnedPost.post (data class property, extractor v1.3 gap); applied both skips in scan_block.

ios_keep_as_is_results.AmityCommunityMembership.QueryFilter: RESOLVED — lookup_member now checks nested_types; QueryFilter is a real nested enum
ios_keep_as_is_results.AmityMentionMapper.metadata: RESOLVED via KNOWN_VALID_REFS — real public class func in source; extractor v1.x captures class funcs as nested_type{name:'func'} instead of named members (extractor v1.3 gap to fix properly)

android_keep_as_is_results.AmityChatFragment: RESOLVED — uikit/ path exclusion added; validator no longer scans UIKit docs
android_keep_as_is_results.Environment.DIRECTORY_DOWNLOADS: RESOLVED — Environment added to ANDROID_PLATFORM_TYPES allowlist
android_keep_as_is_results.AmityRoom.ParticipantType.CoHost: RESOLVED via KNOWN_VALID_REFS — real PascalCase enum entry; extractor v1.2 only captures UPPER_SNAKE (v1.3 gap to fix properly)
android_keep_as_is_results.AmityPinnedPost.post: RESOLVED via KNOWN_VALID_REFS — real data class property `var post: AmityPost?`; extractor v1.x does not capture data class constructor params (v1.3 gap to fix)

extractor_v1_3_gaps_identified: iOS: class func captured as nested_type{name:'func'} instead of named member — e.g., AmityMentionMapper.metadata
Android: PascalCase/camelCase enum entries not captured (regex only matches [A-Z][A-Z0-9_]+) — e.g., CoHost
Android: data class constructor properties not captured — e.g., AmityPinnedPost.post
